name: Antananarivo (Madagascar)

colors.symbolism: two of the quarters and the fleurs-de-lis

description: Quartered in gold and purple: the two gold quarters each bear a zebu (ox) head, and the two purple quarters each bear a golden fleur-de-lis.
history: Antananarivo is the capital and largest city of Madagascar. The quartered arms combine the zebu (a symbol of Madagascar) with the fleur-de-lis.

features.role: zebu (ox) head, in the two gold quarters
fleur-de-lis, in the two purple quarters
